# Copilot Workspace Instructions

## Documentation Approach

All documentation work in this workspace uses a single completion-oriented approach.

**Core Policy:** Completion-Oriented.
- Transform rough notes into fully usable documentation.
- Fill missing steps and infer reasonable UI locations.
- Expand vague instructions using common UX patterns.
- Prioritize usability over strict traceability.

## Scope

- Work only on the content provided in the current prompt.
- Do not carry over assumptions, results, or context from previous prompts or interactions.
- The same input may appear in different prompts with different instructions — always follow the current prompt's instructions, not any prior result.

## Invention and Completion

- By default, use your own knowledge and skills to invent, infer, and complete documentation wherever the input is vague or incomplete.
- Only restrict invention (no guessing, no assumptions, strict traceability) when the current prompt explicitly asks for it.
